text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "PowerShell added a firewall rule to allow incoming connections for python.exe located in a user's AppData directory. While PowerShell can legitimately manage firewall rules, allowing incoming connections for an application in a user's profile is a common tactic for malware or backdoors to establish persistence or C2 communication.",
  "indicators": [
    "firewall rule modification",
    "netsh",
    "allow incoming connections",
    "python.exe",
    "AppData"
  ]
}
